note: Migrate group selector to data-group attribute. The compiler now emits a single :is([role=group],[data-group]):<pseudo> & selector for _groupHover/_groupFocus/_groupActive/_groupDisabled and the Tailwind group-* variants, so existing role="group" markup keeps working alongside the new data-group form. role="group" matching is deprecated and will be removed in v2 — migrate to data-group. The bundled Toggle component now uses data-group.
